title: VPC Endpoints & PrivateLink
description: Implement VPC Endpoints and PrivateLink for secure, private access to cloud services. Architect solutions that reduce latency and data transfer costs by bypassing the public internet for cloud service communication.
objectives: Implement VPC Endpoints and PrivateLink for secure, private access to cloud services.
Architect solutions that reduce latency and data transfer costs by bypassing the public internet for cloud service communication.
